title_en: V-JEPA strengthens the predictive video route
title_zh: V-JEPA 强化了预测式视频路线
description_en: Meta shows that video prediction can avoid direct pixel reconstruction.
description_zh: Meta 展示了视频预测可以不依赖直接像素重建。
why_it_matters: Important for how the field thinks about efficient world-model representations.
